body: Elena — great catching up with you at the [Breakthrough Energy](orgs/breakthrough-energy) summit last week. I wanted to follow up on our conversation about the thermal storage deal you're tracking; given our focus at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) on seed and Series A climate infrastructure, it's squarely in our wheelhouse and I'd love to take a closer look if there's room for a co-investor. Can you share the deck when you get a chance, or flag if the founder is open to introductions at this stage? Also separately, I've been meaning to connect you with a grid-edge AI company out of our current portfolio that I think would be a natural fit for Crossbeam's thesis — happy to make that intro if useful. Let me know what works on your end.
